paragraph: Nebraska Supreme Court rules against AG, finds criminal justice reform bill constitutional. After a multi-year legal fight, Nebraska's Supreme Court ruled Friday that a 2023 criminal justice reform law challenged by the state's Republican Attorney General is constitutional after all. Published by journalstar on 2025-04-18 14:15:00. Read more: https://journalstar.com/news/state-regional/government-politics/article_77a946eb-d734-4726-bf7c-f221cbfba0ae.html
title: Nebraska Supreme Court rules against AG, finds criminal justice reform bill constitutional
